module.name: agent
module.purpose: Agent crate namespace for model/session/task/prompt orchestration. It carries host System metadata through SessionContext from preview handling into initial prompt rendering, routes all SessionEvent traffic through Session before client/host/task dispatch, and lets Task send task/step events through the local session channel while step and execution helpers are split into private task module files.

childModules.name: model
childModules.purpose: Owns agent model backend traits, request/response data, backend errors, and the implemented Deepseek streaming backend. DeepseekBackend loads its config and issues streaming Deepseek chat-completions requests with a provider-supported user-role single-message payload preserving request.prompt as content.

childModules.name: prompt
childModules.purpose: Defines the agent prompt interface, render_template conditional/variable rendering, and InitialPrompt variables for System, Context, NoPreviewTask, and Tools.

childModules.name: session
childModules.purpose: Owns Session startup/routing behavior, the local task event worker/channel, total route_session_event dispatch policy, and SessionContext storage for host System metadata, task previews, and tool previews.

childModules.name: task
childModules.purpose: Owns task runtime state that sends SessionEvents through session_tx, exposes sender/preview interfaces, and splits private step/execution routing into task_step.rs and task_execution.rs while continuing concrete ready steps parsed from StepPlan completions.
